tasks.label: Run Tests (Catch2)
tasks.command: cmake -B build_ninja -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug && cmake --build build_ninja -j$(nproc) --target test_target && ./build_ninja/test_target

tasks.label: Run Server
tasks.command: docker stop cloudflare_tunnel drogon_backend drogon_backend_dev 2>/dev/null || true && docker rm cloudflare_tunnel drogon_backend drogon_backend_dev 2>/dev/null || true && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --force-recreate --remove-orphans
